title: NO_SKIP_SCAN hint disables skip scan for all indexes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (i INTEGER, j INTEGER, k INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(i, j, k));
CREATE TABLE u (i INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO t SELECT a.i, a.i * 10 + b.i, a.i * 100 + b.i * 10 + c.i FROM u a, u b, u c;
key_bug_features: NO_SKIP_SCAN hint affects entire table skip scan behavior
